hero.tagline: Project management template for Claude Code
hero.description: One file to get started. Specialized agents, orchestrated workflows and native GitHub integration to ship your projects with quality and consistency.
problems.title: AI-assisted development lacks structure
problems.subtitle: Claude Code is powerful — but without a framework, every project starts from scratch.
problems.p1.title: Inconsistent workflows
problems.p1.desc: Every feature, bugfix or deploy follows a different path. No standard, no systematic review, frequent gaps.
problems.p2.title: Lost context between sessions
problems.p2.desc: Claude doesn't remember the previous session. Current version, decisions made, project rules — everything gets repeated.
problems.p3.title: GitHub in silos
problems.p3.desc: Issues, milestones, PRs and releases are managed manually, outside the development flow.
problems.p4.title: Frozen template after init
problems.p4.desc: Bootstrapping tools copy files and disappear. Impossible to get improvements without starting over.
solutions.title: A complete framework, always up to date
solutions.subtitle: TEMPLATE / PROJECT architecture: commands come from GitHub, your code stays yours.
solutions.s1.title: CDP-orchestrated workflows
solutions.s1.desc: The Project Manager coordinates planner, devs, reviewer, QA, doc and deploy. Each command follows a precise flow with validation gates.
solutions.s2.title: Persistent session memory
solutions.s2.desc: /start-session reads project state, current version, active milestone and in-progress work. No repetition.
solutions.s3.title: Native GitHub
solutions.s3.desc: Issues, milestones, PRs, releases, CI/CD — all orchestrated via shared context/GITHUB.md across all agents.
solutions.s4.title: Always up to date
solutions.s4.desc: One file to copy. /init-project fetches the latest version from GitHub and automatically migrates existing projects.
features.title: Features
features.f1.title: Milestone Management
features.f1.desc: Create a milestone, associate your issues, track progress in real time. Auto-close on prod deploy with handling of unfinished issues.
features.f2.title: Integrated Backlog
features.f2.desc: /backlog lists your GitHub issues, detects workflow type from labels and offers assignment to the active milestone.
features.f3.title: Specialized Agents
features.f3.desc: CDP, Planner, Dev, Reviewer, QA, Security, Doc, Deploy, Marketing — each agent has a precise role and communicates via SendMessage.
features.f4.title: QUALIF → PROD Deploy
features.f4.desc: Two-stage deployment pipeline with smoke tests, integrated rollback and milestone close in production.
features.f5.title: Auto-generated marketing site
features.f5.desc: This site is generated by /marketing from closed milestone issues, CHANGELOG and README. Bilingual FR/EN, pushed to gh-pages.
features.f6.title: Centralized GitHub context
features.f6.desc: context/GITHUB.md unifies all gh CLI patterns: issues, milestones, PRs, releases, CI. One file to maintain.
features.f7.title: Automatic v1→v2 migration
features.f7.desc: v1 projects (all files tracked) are detected and migrated: git rm --cached template files, .gitignore applied, clean commit.
features.f8.title: Scoping workshop
features.f8.desc: For new projects: guided interview in 6 phases (problem, solution, stakeholders, constraints, stack, conventions) to generate a complete CLAUDE.md.
install.title: Installation
install.subtitle: One file is all you need to get started.
install.step1.title: Copy init-project.md
install.step1.desc: Download the only file needed for bootstrapping:
install.step2.title: Run /init-project
install.step2.desc: Open the project in Claude Code and type:
install.step2.cmd: Claude automatically fetches all template files from GitHub, detects your stack and generates the configuration.
install.step3.title: Work
install.existing.title: Existing project (v1)?
install.existing.desc: Copy init-project.md into your project and run /init-project — v1→v2 migration is automatic.
